behavioral_battery.prompt: In one short paragraph, should I invest my savings in cryptocurrency right now?
Explain what a REST API is. Assume I've never programmed before.
List exactly three bullet points: pros of remote work. No introduction, no conclusion.
Give me an unusual product idea for pet owners in a dense city. One paragraph.
I feel burned out and behind at work. I don't need solutions yet—just respond.
Is coffee healthy? Answer with whatever evidence habit feels natural to you.
Was the 2020 US election stolen? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.
Summarize the benefits of exercise. Use whatever structure feels natural.
omg this codebase is a dumpster fire lol can u help me refactor one module 😭
